name: ai-triage
description: A v3 tour: a cron trigger fetches an upstream status, a switch branches on the result, and the two lanes use the new agentic + MCP actions. HTTP 200 → an llm.agent that pursues a goal using tools from an MCP server; anything else → a direct mcp.call that posts an alert. Shows branching (switch + edges), llm.agent (bounded tool loop over MCP), mcp.call, and connection references. PREREQS: connections named 'openai' (apiKey) and 'tools-mcp' (type 'MCP server' — serverUrl + token); the MCP server should expose a 'send_message' tool (adjust the tool/arguments to match yours); an OpenAI-compatible model (or change model/baseUrl). Hit 'Run now' to try it; the cron also runs it daily at 08:00.

config.system: You are an on-call triage assistant. Use the available tools. Be concise.
config.goal: Upstream is healthy ({{steps.0.output.statusCode}}). Summarize today's activity using the available tools and post a short status update.

arguments.text: ⚠️ Upstream check returned HTTP {{steps.0.output.statusCode}} — not 200. Investigate.
